# MACAddress       : string  — Primary MAC address (if known)
# FirmwareVersion  : string  — Current firmware version (if known)
# OSVersion        : string  — Operating system (for Windows-based assets)
# SafetyCritical   : bool    — True if asset is part of SIS/ESD/safety function
# CompositeScore   : int     — Sum of impact scores (0-40)
# CommPartners     : string  — Semicolon-separated IPs of normal comm partners
# EDRCapable       : bool    — True if device can run endpoint agents
# EDRDeployed      : bool    — True if EDR is currently deployed
# KnownCVEs        : string  — Semicolon-separated active CVEs (if known)
# EngineeringOwner : string  — Responsible engineer or team
# Site             : string  — Physical site name (for multi-site orgs)
# LastValidated    : datetime— Date the entry was last reviewed/validated
